reviews.name: 루****
reviews.content:
요즘 최애 장난감이에요!
푹신푹신 터그놀이가 가능해서 계속 물고 오네요 ~~~!
얼굴에 삑삑이가 있어서 더좋아해요 넘넘 기여워요🤍🙂
reviews.content_en: It's my pup's new favorite toy! 🤍🙂 The soft and squishy material is perfect for tug-of-war, and my dog keeps bringing it back to me ~~~! Plus, it has a squeaker on the face, which makes it even better. So adorable!

reviews.name: 여름
reviews.content:
너무 귀여운 봉봉그린 로프 토이!
작고 가벼운 장난감이지만 바스락+삑삑이+로프+뽀글이 토끼 인형까지 강아지가 좋아할만한 요소들은 전부 들어 있어요! 손으로 잡고 놀기에 그립감..? 도 딱 좋은지 손으로 꽉 잡고 노는 모습이 너무 귀여워요! 귀여운데 튼튼하기까지 해서 오랫동안 재밌게 잘 가지고 놀 수 있을 거 같아요~! ♡♡
reviews.content_en: Such a cute BONG BONG GREEN rope toy! It's small and lightweight, but it has everything a dog could love—crinkly material, a squeaker, rope, and even a fluffy bunny plush! The grip feels perfect to hold in your hand, and watching my pup grab it tightly with both paws is the cutest thing ever! It's adorable AND durable, so I think my dog will enjoy playing with it for a long time~! ♡♡

reviews.name: 감****
reviews.content:
새로 돌아온 봉봉그린 장난감~~
토끼 귀에는 바스락이 들어있어서 물고 씹기 아주 좋더라고요 ㅎㅎ 또 로프에 환장하는 저희 강아지는 한시간동안 혼자 물고 뜯고 즐기면서 놀았는데 보는 제가 너무 뿌듯하더라고요~ 뽀글이 원단도 너무 귀엽고,  요즘 저희 강아지 최애 장난감이 되었어요 ♥
reviews.content_en: The BONG BONG GREEN toy is back~~ The crinkly material in the bunny ears is so fun to chew on, and my dog who's obsessed with ropes spent a whole hour playing with it alone—biting, tugging, and enjoying it. I felt so proud watching! The fluffy material is adorable too, and it's become my pup's favorite toy these days ♥

reviews.name: 프린
reviews.content: 두 손으로 꼭 붙잡고 재미있게 갖고 놀아요! 로프가 달려 있어 터그놀이 하기 딱 좋아요👍🏻다람쥐 얼굴 누르면 삑삑, 바스락 소리 나서 더 환장합니다ㅋㅋ 다견 가정이라 토끼랑 양도 세트로 구매하려구요~🐇🐑
reviews.content_en: My dog holds it tight with both paws and plays with it happily! The rope attached is perfect for tug-of-war 👍🏻 When you press the squirrel face, it squeaks and crinkles, so my dog absolutely loves it ㅋㅋ Since we have multiple dogs, I'm planning to buy the bunny and sheep set too~🐇🐑

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 포장도 깔끔하고 강아지가 가지고 놀기 좋은 장난감이에요!! 처음에 주니까 신나서 물어 뜯고 놀다가 나중엔 터그 놀이도 하고 던지면서도 놀아요🩷
reviews.content_en: The packaging is neat and it's such a great toy for my dog to play with!! At first, my pup was excited and chewed on it, but later started playing tug-of-war and fetch with it too 🩷

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much! It's durable and lasts a long time.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 터그도 되고 삑삑이도 돼서 애기가 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It works as both a tug toy and a squeaker, so my pup loves it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 터그도 되고 삑삑이도 돼서 애기가 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It works as both a tug toy and a squeaker, so my pup loves it!
